free_text: For off-resonance or resonances with large widths the
effective energy E eff = E - DE/2, where E is the
incident energy and DE is the energy lost by the
protons in the target. For resonances with widths
smaller or of the order of the target thickness
film, covered by a very thin gold film 13 ug/cm2.
The reproducibility of beam charge collection
was tested and verified proton Rutherford
